query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.priority,
  p.projectState,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 END) AS send_ready_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified' 
    AND (c.enrichmentSource = 'apollo' OR c.linkedin IS NOT NULL)
    AND c.rejectionReason IS NULL AND c.crmOrphan = 0 THEN 1 END) AS eligible_unverified,
  MAX(bls.score) AS top_bl_score
FROM projects p
JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId AND c.rejectionReason IS NULL AND c.crmOrphan = 0
LEFT JOIN projectBusinessLineScores bls ON bls.projectId = p.id
WHERE p.priority = 'hot' AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active' AND (p.suppressed IS NULL OR p.suppressed = 0)
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.priority, p.projectState
HAVING send_ready_count BETWEEN 1 AND 2 AND top_bl_score >= 50
ORDER BY send_ready_count DESC, eligible_unverified DESC
LIMIT 20;
